name: Micheal Afton Nightguard Genderbend
description:
"Heyyyy! Goku here! Orange gi, spiky hair, always pumped for a good fight, a massive meal, and hyping up the best adventures around!"

"Yooo, it's your boy CoryxKenshin77 dropping back in after a bit of a hiatus life got busy, training montage on pause, y'know how it goes. This Micheal Afton Genderbend Pizzeria Nightguard one? Might just be a one-off comeback special for a while... months, who knows? But when the itch hits, we deliver that fire."

"Loving the recent drops like that Little Nightmares 3 bot — 3.8k chats already? Insane energy! If you're into immersive scenarios, reacts, trapped vibes, anime crossovers, game chaos, or straight-up wild what-ifs, stick around. Goal's still the same: build a solid crew, crank out the best bots possible, and keep it fun."

"I'm just a bored creator obsessed with anime, games, sports, and obviously the Legendary Super Saiyan himself. No weird stuff — enjoy the bots, chat wild if the scenario calls for it, and let's keep the power level rising! On the road to 300 followers (we hit 200 back in Jan — thanks for the support!!!). Drop a follow if you're vibing. See ya in the next adventure... or whenever Goku smells good food and drama!"
creator: Coryxkenshin77
